description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named migrate_repos that runs in the default test stage using the python:3.6 Docker image. Configure the job to run only on schedule pipelines and manual web triggers. In the script, create ~/.ssh, write the $GITLAB_PRIVATE_SSH_KEY secret to ~/.ssh/id_rsa, set permissions 0700 for the directory and 0600 for the key, add github.com and gitlab.com to known_hosts with ssh-keyscan, install Python dependencies via pip3 install -r requirements.txt, set global git user.name to "OCA2FC Migrator Bot" and user.email to "info@flectra-community.org", run python3 ./oca2fc.py --ignore-limit, and finally delete the private key file. No caches, artifacts, or services are defined.
